race.description: Ladbrokes Racing Extras In Multi Plate (C3)
race.comment: SPACEBALLS (15) saves her best form for this distance range with a win and three seconds from just four attempts and brings solid NSW formlines to the table. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. GRAMMAR LAD (7) will be ready to peak now third run back and looks to be improving with racing this campaign. Should prove tough to hold out. BOLLINGER MISS (14) goes well for rider Fenlon who has a win and two placings from just four rides. Again gets the benefit of her 1.5kg claim and is sure to be right there at the business end. BOOM SHOT (1) was a touch flat at the latest outing but the form prior was good enough for a race of this calibre. Worth another chance. GLASS OF ROSE (10) next in line in a race with a bunch of chances.
